race.description: Win Network Country Boosted Maiden Plate
race.comment: BUNDORAN (6) sets the standard for some likely newcomers. Just missed twice at this level before tackling stronger at Beaumont (Newcastle) and finding it a stretch too far. Will appreciate the drop in grade, and this is her chance to break through. Keep a close eye on the betting moves with the debutants. ROCK EMPEROR (4) has the blinkers on and owns a comfortable trial win at Scone. Keeps Weir from that and the one prior, and he looks to have good ability. SPARROW (13) is another debutant who demands consideration. Jumps from a low barrier and has also trialled well at Scone. PUTINACALL (10) draws wide but just missed in a recent Beaumont trial. Weir gets off, but a decent run is likely on debut.
